name: affiliate-shortlink-cloak
description: Current CloakBrowser + Playwright affiliate shortlink bridge (Shopee + Lazada, multi-account). Replaces the removed legacy Electron apps/affiliate-shortlink bridge.

scripts.check: node --check bin/start.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/browser.js && node --check src/accounts.js && node --check src/normalize.js && node --check src/payload.js && node --check src/platforms.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/shopee-route.js && node --check src/shopee-accounts.js && node --check src/shopee.js && node --check src/lazada.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); new Function('return ('+fs.readFileSync('src/lazada-shorten.js','utf8')+')')" && node --check src/login.js && node --check src/keychain.js && node --check src/click-report.js && node --check src/conversion-report.js
